_comment: Short acknowledgments shown right after a purchase is logged. Data-driven so writers can add lines without touching code. Keep them quick and warm. {merchant} and {amount} are optional placeholders; the app drops them when missing, so place them mid-sentence where the line still reads cleanly without them.
lines: Recorded {amount} in a blink. On you go.
Noted {merchant} before the receipt hit your pocket.
In the book. Small entries, honest totals.
Done. Ten seconds now, a clear picture later.
Got it. Future-you keeps the benefit.
Counted {amount} toward the month. Steady as ever.
On the record. Showing up is the whole skill.
